_README: Maps an offline data key (data_learning/data/<key>.json) to a LIVE
series so scripts/refresh_data.py can replace the bundled 'Illustrative'
snapshot with real, source-backed numbers. For a data channel, accuracy
IS the brand: a fabricated figure attributed to a real agency is the
fastest way to earn a 'fake stats' reputation.
scale multiplies every value (e.g. billions->trillions = 0.001). label
='year' trims FRED date labels to a 4-digit year so the chart x-axis
matches the existing year-labelled trend files.
SAFETY: refresh_data.py defaults to DRY-RUN. Eyeball the printed numbers
against the live series page (fred.stlouisfed.org/series/<SERIES>) before
re-running with --write. Series IDs below are high-confidence percent/year
matches; add more only after verifying the unit + frequency line up.
